headline: Record Q2 Results And Raised 2026 Guidance Might Change The Case For Investing In Kinder Morgan (KMI)
summary: Kinder Morgan, Inc. has already reported its Q2 2026 results, posting higher sales of US$4,477 million and net income of US$867 million versus the prior year, alongside year-to-date gains in revenue and earnings per share from continuing operations. The company’s record quarter, broad-based segment contributions, and decision to raise full-year 2026 guidance highlight how growing natural gas demand and a sizeable project backlog are influencing Kinder Morgan’s earnings profile. Next, we’ll...
